code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut token = ""
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let total = list.len(nums)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut j = 0
while j < total
  match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut idx = 0
    let s_len = list.len(sorted)
    while idx < s_len
      match list.get(sorted, idx)
      when Some(y)
        if not inserted and x < y
          new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
          inserted = true
        end
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
      when None
        ()
      end
      idx = idx + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut p = 0
let sl = list.len(sorted)
while p < sl
  match list.get(sorted, p)
  when Some(v)
    if p == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  p = p + 1
end
println(out)
